name: GARTNER INC
business: Gartner delivers actionable, objective business and technology insights to over 13,000 enterprises in approximately 90 countries. It offers subscription-based insights, conferences, and consulting services to help clients with mission-critical priorities. The company operates through three segments: Business and Technology Insights, Conferences, and Consulting.
sellsTo: functional leaders (HR, supply chain, finance, marketing)

exposures.sentence: In August 2025, we launched AskGartner, our new AI-powered tool that gives clients an improved user experience by providing faster, more efficient access to our insights, to licensed users globally.
We anticipate encountering more competition with increased adoption of AI services in the markets in which we compete.
We are exposed to risks related to cybersecurity.
